name: Claude Multi-Account
description: Register additional Claude Code logins (Max/Pro accounts) as first-class OpenClaw CLI backends for cross-account failover, keeping the full skills/MCP harness on every account.

accounts.description: Additional Claude accounts to register as CLI backends. Each becomes a provider prefix usable in model refs and fallback chains, e.g. claude-icloud/claude-fable-5.

id.description: Backend id / provider prefix, e.g. 'claude-icloud'. Must be unique and not collide with the bundled 'claude-cli'.

configDir.description: Isolated CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR for this login (keeps its sessions separate from the native login and other accounts).

oauthTokenFile.description: Path to a file (0600) containing this account's Claude Code setup-token. Read at launch and passed as CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN. Mutually exclusive with oauthTokenRef.

oauthTokenRef.description: Secret reference (e.g. 1Password) resolving to this account's Claude Code setup-token. Preferred over oauthTokenFile.
